profiles.description: Airtable records — depth-limited truncation (field names vary per base and table)

profiles.description: AWS CLI/SDK responses — depth-limited JSON truncation (AWS responses vary too much for field extraction)

profiles.description: Chargebee subscription billing — extracts id, status, plan, customer, period, and amount from subscriptions, customers, and invoices
profiles.author: sakebomb

profiles.description: Confluence page and search results — extracts id, title, space, status, version
profiles.author: sakebomb

profiles.description: Datadog monitors, events, and dashboards — extracts id, name/title, type, status, query, tags
profiles.author: sakebomb

profiles.description: Figma comments, components and styles — extracts id, message/name, description
profiles.author: sakebomb

profiles.description: GCP resource lists — extracts name, id, status, zone from items arrays
profiles.author: sakebomb

profiles.description: Gmail message lists and search results — extracts id, from, subject, date, snippet
profiles.author: sakebomb

profiles.description: Google Calendar events — extracts title, start, end, location, attendee count; discards full descriptions and recurrence rules
profiles.author: sakebomb

profiles.description: Grafana dashboards, alerts, and data sources — extracts uid, title, status, url, tags
profiles.author: sakebomb

profiles.description: HubSpot CRM contacts, deals, and companies — extracts key fields and discards full property histories
profiles.author: sakebomb

profiles.description: Jira issue and search results — extracts key, summary, status, assignee, priority
profiles.author: sakebomb

profiles.description: Notion pages, databases, and search results — depth-limited truncation (block/property structures vary per database)
profiles.author: sakebomb

profiles.description: Shopify orders, products, and customers — extracts id, title/name, status, price, email, fulfillment
profiles.author: sakebomb

profiles.description: Stripe payments — extracts id, object type, status, amount, currency, customer, email from charges, customers, subscriptions, invoices
profiles.author: sakebomb

profiles.description: Microsoft Teams messages, channels, and chats — extracts id, subject, sender, timestamp, importance
profiles.author: sakebomb

profiles.description: Vercel deployments and projects — extracts name, status, url, created, duration
profiles.author: sakebomb

profiles.description: Xero accounting — extracts key fields from invoices, contacts, accounts, and bank transactions
profiles.author: sakebomb
